title: Caregiver
description: Caregiver gives you options to better help your roleplay as a caregiver and liltte this mod uses NappyCaft or QAL for the diaper funtions.
body:
![Mode Returning Soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ce27c9ee76127a458b704d084e4be503adbc79.png) Still updating but we are now working on this project.
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bec50e0f2643695858229307290460cfa8dcd56.png) **Please note**:
Creator/Maintainer Note: Hey everyone I am Fay, I have taken over the project, I can't get hold of the Original creator and Regressia didn't really have a path for this mod so future updates will be fully my view and path but I will have a place on my discord for people to help mould it's future.
**Main Mod**: Caregiver is a add-on to NappyCraft & QAL, NappyCraft is a good mod but the owners created the items for you to relive your regressed self or include disabled people, where Caregiver opens up the possiblity to be cared for with the same ideas and items with a more strucutred manner. **What will this mod do**? It will give you the command /cg & /caregiver commands, this lets you able to safely play house. You can give a player permission to be your caregiver they can do things like change/check you bum, hear you cry and pat your bottom. This mod was created as an addon to NappyCraft but now also supports QAL Caregiver also adds new toys to the game like the little tyles cars and other fun toys. **Commands**? - Caregiver: - /cg check {username} If your little as enabled you this will enable you to check your littles diaper. - /cg pat {username} If the person you want to pat as there pat level on All or Carer you will be able to pat them. - Little: - /cg carer This will tell you whom you have enabled to be your caregiver - /cg carer {username} This will enable the username to become your caregiver if not yet set.. - /cg carer {username} update Update to a new carer without clearing first. - /cg carer clear This will enable you to remove your current carer. - /cg carer flush This will enable you to remove all current carers. - /cg pat {Username} or {option[All/Carer/None]} This will enable you to set whom can pat you, pats are disabled by default. You can still pat people if they have ALL set to there pat options or you as their caregiver. - /cg reply {Message} (_unknown if works in 0.0.3.2_) This will enable the little to send messages to there caregiver without needing to remember there username, we know what babies are like, forgetful it also keeps the role play element out of the main chat but also you don't have to remember the /whisper command. /cg carer must be set /cg carer {Username} - /cry wet {Caregiver}, will create a toast pop up for your caregiver you named. - /cry food {Caregiver}, will create a toast pop up for your caregiver you named. - All: Pat: - / cg pat {username} This is like the good all days with Yahoo or MSN Plus where you could poke and pat people, this function only works if the person your patting as enabled pats for all users **None command functions**? As of 0.0.3.2 When sleeping now you have a 40% chance of wetting your diaper, there is a 60% chance to fully wetting and 40% chance to just wet one stage
Can we have diaper/item/funtion ABC: To follow the age regression and disabled path of NappyCraft and the rules of the platforms we are hosted on, we will only adding Medical diapers and functions that will adapt the same ideas, this is to keep it safe and fun for everyone but please use our [Discord](https://invite.quimisfay.co.uk) to ask for your ideas.
How to remove watermark There is no watermarks in Quims builds so any build from and after 0.0.3.2
*Credits*: - QuimIsFay: Current owner - BabyMaxy2006: Orginal mod owner and creator, - Regressia: Kept it going and handing it off to Quim. - A anonymous User for a idea of audio in the /cg {username} pat function. - c9e2.0 for the idea of possibility of accidents whole sleeping. **Social Media**: - [X/Twitter](https://x.com/quimisfay) - [BlueSkys](https://bsky.app/profile/quimisfay.co.uk)
